title: Gerascanthus ellipticus
intro: Gerascanthus ellipticus, also known as the elliptical Gerascanthus, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and inflammation, due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The bioactive constituents of Gerascanthus ellipticus include flavonoids, alkaloids, and phenolic acids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. In traditional herbal medicine, Gerascanthus ellipticus is often prepared as a decoction or infused tea, and is also used in the production of tinctures and ointments.
